REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE (SUPPLEMENTAL) RE: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS; AND DECLARATION OF JOHN P. GIRARDE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HOTEL SUNRISE L.L.C., KIRIT PATEL AND DHARMESH PATEL'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE COURT DECLINES TO RULE ON THE MOTION. IN FILING THE MOTION, DEFENDANTS SOUGHT PRIMARILY TO CHALLENGE THE CLASS ALLEGATIONS OF THE FOURTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFFS HAVE DISMISSED THOSE ALLEGATIONS. THE COURT WOULD ADDRESS THE COLLATERAL ESTOPPEL ISSUE WERE IT LIMITED TO THE ALLEGED FRAUD. HOWEVER, IT ALSO INCLUDES HABITABILITY AND THAT ISSUE APPEARS TO BE A PART OF SEVERAL OF THE PLAINTIFF'S OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. FOR THAT REASON, THE TRIAL JUDGE WILL BE IN A FAR BETTER POSITION TO DETERMINE WHAT SHOULD AND SHOULD NOT BE TRIED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS HOTEL SUNRISE L.L.C., KIRIT PATEL AND DHARMESH PATEL'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE COURT DECLINES TO RULE ON THE MOTION. IN FILING THE MOTION, DEFENDANTS SOUGHT PRIMARILY TO CHALLENGE THE CLASS ALLEGATIONS OF THE FOURTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFFS HAVE DISMISSED THOSE ALLEGATIONS. THE COURT WOULD ADDRESS THE COLLATERAL ESTOPPEL ISSUE WERE IT LIMITED TO THE ALLEGED FRAUD. HOWEVER, IT ALSO INCLUDES HABITABILITY AND THAT ISSUE APPEARS TO BE A PART OF SEVERAL OF THE PLAINTIFF'S OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. FOR THAT REASON, THE TRIAL JUDGE WILL BE IN A FAR BETTER POSITION TO DETERMINE WHAT SHOULD AND SHOULD NOT BE TRIED. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR 8098
